use_cases: Primary action buttons in web forms and interfaces
Destructive action buttons with visual warning
Icon-only buttons for compact UI spaces
ai_summary: A versatile button component with multiple variants (default, destructive, outline, secondary, ghost, link) and sizes (default, sm, lg, icon). Built on Radix UI Slot for composition and class-variance-authority for variant management. Follows shadcn/ui design patterns with full accessibility support, including focus-visible ring styling and disabled states.
